title: 2. Needle CeSanLi (77.22) and CeXiaSanLi (77.23). 针侧三里、侧下三里。
text:
In case of zygomatic pain, it is also advisable to needle CeSanLi and CeXiaSanLi. In severe case, bleed SanChong.
WanShunYi is also a good point. YangLingQuan (GB 34) and HouXi (SI 3) are also very effective.
